(1) इन िनयम犘 को आयुध (संशोधन) िनयम, 2017 कहा जाएगा। (2) ये शासक琉य राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत 琈कये जाने क琉 तारीख से 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे। 2. आयुध िनयम, 2016 के िनयम 15, उप िनयम (2) और (4) म犆 अंक犘, अ楹र犘 तथा श瀑द ‘1, अ灹ैल 2017’ को अंक犘, अ楹र犘 तथा श瀑द ‘1, अ灹ैल 2018’ से 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा। [फा. सं. वी.-11026/133/2017-आयुध] मुकेश िम牵ल, संयु猴 सिचव MINSTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1468(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 44 of the Arms Act, 1959 (54 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Arms Rules, 2016, namely:— (1) These rules may be called the Arms (Amendment) Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Arms Rules, 2016, in rule 15, in sub-rules (2) and (4) for the figures, letters and words “1st day of April, 2017” the figures, letters and words “1st April, 2018” shall be substituted. [F. No. V.-11026/133/2017-Arms] MUKESH MITTAL, Jt.
